text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm waiting for Mejiro Ryan. She hasn't shown up
for training yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer! I didn't mean to skip training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I got caught up talking to one of the younger
students, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I consider how to respond to Ryan's apology,
another Umamusume enters the room.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me... Please don't get mad at Ryan. It was
all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I thought she didn't have any training today, so I
asked her for advice about my diet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh! You didn't have to come. I can handle it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It appears Ryan is trying to protect this girl.
choice_data_list: Just try to be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: S-so it's all right? Oh, what a relief.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've learned today that Ryan is very much beloved
by the younger students.
